title: So it was a four-day cruise.
content:
So it was a four-day cruise.

They left from Texas.

So they were on in sea for two days and then they went to Casumel for one day and then back in one day.

So day one and two, you're on the boat, and they were interviewing people, and they're like, oh, my God, it was so great.

There was a cruise director, if there was fun on every square end of the ship, there was fun, there was food, you know, there was something happening the whole time, drinks and fun and this, that, and the other thing.

So and then the third day, everybody went to Casumel.

Cosumel.

It's Mexico.

So everybody's in Casumel.

Like one group that they were interviewing and the girl was a, she was at a bachelorette party.

She's like, honestly, I don't even know how I got back on the ship.

She goes, we drank a lot in Cum out.

Like, she's like, so they're going on and on and on.
context: From document: 4320 Mariners Cove Dr 2.m4a — chunk 198 (chunk 198/225)
